# Tareabox HyperFrames Catalog

> 133 video composition items for HyperFrames (HTML-based video framework):
> 55 blocks + 78 components. By Natalie Digital (Natalie Abadie). See LICENSE.

## What this repo provides

Two types of items, both self-contained HTML files with embedded CSS, GSAP animations, and timeline data:

- **Blocks** (55) — full-screen scenes with their own background. Use as standalone composition (mount via `data-composition-src`).
- **Components** (78) — transparent overlays. Layer on top of any block, video, or composition (paste-inline per official `hyperframes-registry` skill).

Both come in vertical (1080×1920 for Reels/TikTok/Shorts) and horizontal (1920×1080 for YouTube) variants.

## Categories

**Blocks** (55, full scenes):
- **layout** (27) — YouTube setups (PIP, watchlater, split-screen, tier-list), tutorials, recap, hooks
- **conversationapp** (12) — iMessage, WhatsApp, Discord, gif-chat, android/imessage-pure notifs (full-screen scenes)
- **visual** (10) — effects with integral video (meme-cutin, gif-burst, gif-stickers, gif-crumple, zoom-indicator)
- **text** (6) — neon-flashing, neon-glow, chapter-reveal (full-screen typography scenes)

**Components** (78, transparent overlays):
- **text** (40) — typewriter, warp, kinetic, glitch, headline-highlight, fullscreen-statement, etc.
- **conversationapp** (12) — instagram-dm, ios-notif, instagram-comment, slack, tweet, tweet-quote (cards)
- **visual** (12) — callouts (tip/note/warning), keyboard-shortcut, progress-bar, timestamp-cue
- **layout** (10) — recap-card, lower-third, video-caption, video-hero, video-hook (overlay treatments)
- **data** (4) — checklist, metric-flip

## Install

Add to your project's `hyperframes.json`:
```json
{ "registry": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tareabox/tareabox-catalog-free/main/registry" }
```
Then:
```bash
npx hyperframes add <name>
```

Blocks install to `compositions/<name>.html`. Components install to `compositions/components/<name>.html`.

Or `git clone` and copy items manually from `registry/blocks/{name}/` (blocks) or `registry/components/{name}/` (components).

## Live preview

All 133 items rendered: https://tareabox.com/hf-catalog-free/
